title: Ominous Trial Key Recipe
description: Now craft your own Ominous Trial Key
body:
☠️ Ominous Trial Key Recipe Datapack  
Summon the storm—no raid required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for the Ominous Trial Key, letting players craft their way into high-stakes Trial Chambers without relying on raid captains.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Ominous Potion + 1 Trial Key
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with raid mechanics and trial escalation  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
